uncovered_items.description: ConPort database persistence implementation
Day 19-20: Feedback & Iteration (12-14 hours)
Day 9: Notification Batching (3-4 hours)
Day 8: Productivity Indicators Deep Dive (6-7 hours)
Day 7: Desktop Commander Integration (4-5 hours)

Week 3: Slack Integration & Message Triage
Week 1: Core Infrastructure & ADHD Engine Integration
Document MCP token budgeting best practices for future MCP development (add to docs/best-practices/mcp-token-management.md)
Monitor MCP servers for edge cases after token limit fixes deployment
Test MCP token limit fixes in production: large files (package-lock.json), bulk queries (100 decisions), multi-step Zen analysis
Restart Claude Code to load all MCP token limit fixes (dope-context, Serena, ConPort, Zen)

all_records.description: ConPort database persistence implementation
Setting up LiteLLM database configuration and connection - BLOCKED: Waiting for PostgreSQL 'litellm' database creation (see Decision #210)

Week 1: Core Infrastructure & ADHD Engine Integration
Document MCP token budgeting best practices for future MCP development (add to docs/best-practices/mcp-token-management.md)
Add token budget monitoring and logging to MCP servers for optimization insights (track truncation frequency, budget usage %)
Create shared MCP response budget utility (services/shared/mcp_response_budget.py) to standardize token management across all MCP servers
Monitor MCP servers for edge cases after token limit fixes deployment
Test MCP token limit fixes in production: large files (package-lock.json), bulk queries (100 decisions), multi-step Zen analysis
Restart Claude Code to load all MCP token limit fixes (dope-context, Serena, ConPort, Zen)
